'''Denuhi-Eight''' was a terrestrial celestial body<ref name="GG12" /> located in the [[Denuhi system/Legends|Denuhi system]], a part of the [[Greater Plooriod sector/Legends|Greater Plooriod sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was home to a population of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Baragwin/Legends|Baragwin]] [[Species/Legends|species]], members of which tended to be cautious but friendly.<ref name="GG12" />

==Behind the scenes==
Denuhi-Eight was mentioned in the [[1995]] [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebook ''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]'', in an entry authored by [[Jean Rabe]].<ref name="GG12" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Denuhi [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Denuhi-Eight, in grid square M-7.<ref name="TEA" />
